title: Question: got an error on MINGW with v4.002
body:
--- Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong** Original Redmine Message: 2636 from https://www.veripool.org --- I have an error on compiling new v4.002.
It seems that 'nrand48' function is missing on MinGW64.
Can I change with other rand function?

Anyway greate job for multithread^^~
``` admin@localCI MINGW64 /e/MinGW/verilator-4.002 1. make ------------------------------------------------------------ making verilator in src D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C src make[1]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src' D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C obj_dbg -j 1 TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg' make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'. make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg' D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C obj_dbg TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg' Compile flags: g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/mingw64/share/verilator" g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/mingw64/share/verilator\" -c ../V3Partition.cpp ../V3Partition.cpp: In member function 'void PartPropagateCpSelfTest::go()': ../V3Partition.cpp:358:29: error: 'nrand48' was not declared in this scope unsigned idx1 = nrand48(rngState) % 50; ^~~~~~~ ../V3Partition.cpp:358:29: note: suggested alternative: 'srand' unsigned idx1 = nrand48(rngState) % 50; ^~~~~~~ srand make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:283: V3Partition.o] Error 1 make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg' make[1]: *** [Makefile:70: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2 make[1]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src' make: *** [Makefile:192: verilator_exe] Error 2 ```
code_blocks:
admin@localCI MINGW64 /e/MinGW/verilator-4.002
1. make
------------------------------------------------------------
making verilator in src
D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C src
make[1]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src'
D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C obj_dbg -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg'
D:/Program/TestDrive/bin/msys64/mingw64/bin/make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg'
       Compile flags:  g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/mingw64/share/verilator"
g++ -I/mingw64/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG      -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/mingw64/share/verilator\" -c ../V3Partition.cpp
../V3Partition.cpp: In member function 'void PartPropagateCpSelfTest::go()':
../V3Partition.cpp:358:29: error: 'nrand48' was not declared in this scope
              unsigned idx1 = nrand48(rngState) % 50;
                              ^~~~~~~
../V3Partition.cpp:358:29: note: suggested alternative: 'srand'
              unsigned idx1 = nrand48(rngState) % 50;
                              ^~~~~~~
                              srand
make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:283: V3Partition.o] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src/obj_dbg'

make[1]: Leaving directory 'E:/MinGW/verilator-4.002/src'
make: *** [Makefile:192: verilator_exe] Error 2
